series_metadata.series_description: Forms submitted by private facilities that provide services to students placed at the facility. This includes forms SF-14P, SF-6P, ADM-1-P Actual and ADM-1-P Estimate.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: , provided state auditor has conducted an audit, audit reports are released, and audit issues are resolved ; Electronic: , provided state auditor, has conducted an audit, audit reports are released, and audit issues are resolved
